name: Lasagna Maria
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook Lasagna noodles according to package directions, omitting salt, and then drain.
2. Cook sausage until browned, stirring to crumble; drain.
3. Stir spaghetti sauce into sausage, and set aside.
4. Combine egg and the next five ingredients, stirring well.
5. Spread about 1/2 cup meat sauce in a lightly greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
6. Layer half of the noodles, half of ricotta cheese mixture, one-third of mozzarella cheese, and one-third of remaining meat sauce.
7. Repeat layers using equal amounts.
8. Arrange mushrooms and pepperoni slices on top.
9. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
10. Sprinkle with remaining cheese, and bake an additional five minutes.
